use_cases: Landing page decorative animation to add visual interest
Loading or waiting state indicator with playful motion
Demo showcase or portfolio presentation element
Interactive creative tool visual feedback element
ai_summary: A minimalist dark-themed CSS animation component featuring bouncy balls with corresponding shadows. Uses flat color styling with subtle shadow depth effects. The animation runs continuously, creating a playful bouncing motion ideal for decorative purposes, loading states, or adding visual interest to landing pages and demos.
